class: Deployment only. No feature work, no schema invention, no gateway-report-vs-path, no declared-deny enforcement, no SNMP, no scheduler. Build per-host (glibc differs); same commit everywhere; fail-closed; VM last.
order_executed: sushi-k (canary) -> lil-nas-x (NAS) -> Linode VM (public, last). Operator-chosen VM-last (blast radius); overrides old memory's Linode-first note.
not_build_once: glibc forces per-host build: sushi-k/NAS are 2.39 (shared binary 67a807a); VM is 2.35 (built on-host, 812dc40). Same source commit, different binaries by necessity.

targets.mechanism: user systemd (systemctl --user) — NO sudo. nq-publish.service + nq-serve.service.
targets.health: HTTP 200 on 127.0.0.1:9848; witness frame + proof-checker disclaimer + posture note present; cannot-testify boundaries x4; leak language 0; schema 58.
targets.notes: Pre-existing unrelated WARN: smart-witness helper path stale (~/git/nq-witness/examples/nq-smart-witness missing after notquery->nq-root repo move). Not a deploy regression.

targets.mechanism: user systemd (systemctl --user). Memory was STALE (said setsid daemons + no units).
targets.before: OLD SINGLE BINARY nq (May-28, f873b58) via ExecStart 'nq serve' / 'nq publish' — a month stale; the Jun-4 split binaries were on disk but units never switched to them.
targets.after: nq-monitor 67a807a / nq-witness f1d25f2 (commit 6a8c443); UNITS MODERNIZED: ExecStart -> 'nq-monitor serve' / 'nq-witness'.
targets.binary_rollback: old `nq` binary retained at /home/claude/nq/nq (untouched); unit backups *.pre-6a8c443.bak
targets.health: HTTP 200 on 127.0.0.1:9848; witness frame present; leak 0; listeners now nq-monitor/nq-witness; schema 58.
targets.notes: First swap attempt failed (port-in-use) because the documented pkill pattern didn't match the real (user-systemd) processes; no damage (old kept serving). Diagnosed -> forward-modernized units with auto-rollback armed.

targets.mechanism: system systemd (root). nq-publish.service + nq-serve.service; Caddy reverse-proxies :9848.
targets.before: nq-monitor 5489ba3 (Jun-4 on-host build), schema 56. Units already on split binaries (no unit change needed).
targets.after: nq-monitor 812dc40 (built ON-HOST, glibc 2.35) + nq-witness, commit 6a8c443; schema 56->58.
targets.health: local 127.0.0.1:9848 HTTP 200; PUBLIC https://nq.neutral.zone HTTP 200; witness frame + proof-checker disclaimer present; leak language 0 (incl. no 192.168.68/dmz.spooky); migration 57+58 applied clean.
targets.notes: rsync excluded runs/ (.claude, .governor, target, .git) -> real lease receipts NOT shipped to public box; confirmed absent + no real topology in /opt/notquery/src. Build-on-host required (glibc 2.35 != sushi-k 2.39).

evidence_verdict: PASS. All three hosts on commit 6a8c443, dashboards 200, witness/canon render boundaries live, zero leak language, schema 58, clean startup. Public nq.neutral.zone verified.
rollback_summary: Per-host: previous binaries + pre-migration DB backups retained; sushi-k rollback dir; NAS unit + old-nq backups; VM .pre-6a8c443 binary + DB backups. NAS and VM deploys had auto-rollback guards (fail-closed) that did not fire.
fences_honored: Deployment only. No feature/schema/dashboard-semantic changes. No next research packet started. No push beyond the already-pushed 6a8c443. runs/ (real lease data) kept off the public VM.
follow_ups: Deployment is NOT standardized across hosts (3 different shapes); operator named standardization as a future packet. The stale deploy memory has been refreshed in this project's memory.
sushi-k smart-witness helper path is stale (notquery->nq-root move) — separate fix.
NQ_BUILD_COMMIT appears unconsumed by the build (binary hash unchanged with/without it) — verify FLEET_INDEX commit-truth source later.
push: No new push (6a8c443 already on origin/main).
